item.title: 🚢🇺🇸 US Navy plans Trump-class nuclear battleships to counter China
item.description: The US Navy announced plans to build up to 15 nuclear-powered Trump-class battleships by 2055, dubbed the "Golden Fleet," though analysts question their vulnerability to anti-ship missiles and whether the US has sufficient industrial capacity.
item.dc:creator: SCMP

item.title: 🇺🇦💥 SBU strikes Moscow defense plants and Crimea airbase in coordinated drone raid
item.description: Ukrainian SBU and armed forces hit the Angstrem semiconductor plant in Zelenograd, the Moscow oil refinery, and military airfields in Crimea in one of the largest drone operations against Russian military-industrial targets.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Post

item.title: 🇨🇺🇺🇸 US to indict Raúl Castro over 1996 Brothers to the Rescue shootdown
item.description: The US Justice Department will formally charge former Cuban president Raúl Castro next Wednesday in Miami for the 1996 downing of two civilian aircraft operated by the exile group Brothers to the Rescue, which killed four volunteers.
item.dc:creator: El País

item.title: 🇮🇷🇵🇰 Iranian president thanks neighbors for blocking territory use against Iran
item.description: Iran President Masoud Pezeshkian praised neighboring countries for preventing "misuse of their territory" against Iran during a meeting with Pakistan interior minister, amid ongoing regional tensions and ceasefire negotiations.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ AIPAC leads record spending to unseat Thomas Massie in House primary
item.description: Pro-Israel groups are pouring unprecedented funds into defeating Rep. Thomas Massie (R-KY) in what has become the most expensive House primary in history, with AIPAC and aligned super PACs spending millions on attack ads.
item.dc:creator: Politico

item.title: 🦠 WHO Declares Ebola Outbreak in Congo-Uganda Global Health Emergency
item.description: The World Health Organization designated the Ebola outbreak caused by the Bundibugyo virus spreading across Congo and Uganda as a public health emergency of international concern, signaling the need for coordinated global response.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Drone Attack Kills Four in Russia, Moscow Hit in Largest Strike in Over a Year
item.description: At least four people were killed in a major Ukrainian drone attack on Russian regions, with Moscow facing its largest assault in more than a year, marking an escalation in cross-border strikes.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇦🇪💥 Drone Strike Sparks Fire Near UAE Nuclear Plant as Iran Ceasefire Frays
item.description: A drone strike caused a fire near the Barakah nuclear power plant in the UAE, with authorities confirming no injuries or radiological release, as regional tensions persist following the Iran conflict.
item.dc:creator: WSJ

item.title: 🇵🇪 Peru Presidential Election Heads to Second Round
item.description: Peru presidential election will proceed to a runoff as no candidate secured enough votes for an outright victory in the first round.
item.dc:creator: AP

item.title: 🇺🇸 China Tariff Policy: US to Assess Action if Overcapacity Found
item.description: US Trade officials indicated they will evaluate potential actions if Chinese overcapacity is identified, following the Trump-Xi summit discussions on trade relations.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesia Pushes Back on Chinese Business Group Complaints Over Tougher Rules
item.description: Indonesia defended its stricter investment regulations after a Chinese business group complained that the new rules hurt foreign investors.
item.dc:creator: SCMP

item.title: 🇺🇦 At Least 2 Killed, 41 Injured in Russian Attacks Across Ukraine
item.description: Russian forces continued attacks across Ukraine, killing at least two and injuring 41 over the past day amid ongoing hostilities.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇺🇸⛪ White House Hosts Mass Prayer Event Promoting Christian Origins of US
item.description: The White House hosted a large-scale prayer event emphasizing the Christian foundations of the United States, marking a significant religious-political gathering.
item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: 🇳🇱 ASML-Tata Sign Semiconductor Deal as Modi Visits Netherlands
item.description: ASML and Tata Electronics signed a semiconductor partnership agreement during Indian Prime Minister Modi visit to the Netherlands, advancing India chip manufacturing ambitions.
item.dc:creator: Daily Sabah

item.title: 🇺🇸 Drone Threat from Cuba Under Assessment, US Report Says
item.description: The United States is evaluating potential drone threats originating from Cuba according to a new assessment report.
item.dc:creator: Al Arabiya

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Signals Tariff Cuts, Advances Farm Market Access After Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Following the Trump-Xi summit, China indicated it would reduce tariffs and open its agricultural market further as part of trade negotiations with the United States.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea Seeks Options to Avoid Samsung Strike
item.description: South Korea government announced it will pursue all available options to prevent a potential Samsung strike amid labor disputes.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇦🇪 Abu Dhabi: Drone Strike Caused Fire at Barakah Nuclear Plant, No Injuries
item.description: Abu Dhabi authorities confirmed a drone strike sparked a fire at the Barakah nuclear power plant, but reported no injuries and no radiological release.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇮🇹 Italy PM Meloni Heads to Modena After Car Ramming, Cancels Cyprus Meeting
item.description: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni traveled to Modena following a car ramming incident and cancelled her scheduled Cyprus meeting.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇮🇳 Tata Electronics-ASML Partner on India First Semiconductor Fab
item.description: Tata Electronics and ASML announced a partnership to build India first semiconductor fabrication facility, marking a major milestone in the country chip manufacturing ambitions.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸 Iran War: Trump Says US Controls Strait of Hormuz, Fighting Could Resume
item.description: President Trump stated the US, not Iran, controls the Strait of Hormuz and warned that fighting could resume, as Iranian state television prepares the public for potential war.
item.dc:creator: CBS News

item.title: ⚔️ Army Leaders Face Questions Over Poland Deployment Cancellation
item.description: US Army leaders are facing scrutiny from Congress over the cancellation of a planned deployment to Poland.
item.dc:creator: Defense News

item.title: ⚔️ NATO Grapples with Ground Robots in Combat Near Russian Border
item.description: NATO forces are testing and integrating ground-based robotic systems in combat scenarios near the Russian border, exploring new battlefield technologies.
item.dc:creator: Defense News

item.title: 🌍 Kenya Hosts Africa Summit with France Macron and Ruto
item.description: Kenya hosted an Africa summit attended by French President Emmanuel Macron and Kenyan President William Ruto to discuss continental issues.
item.dc:creator: AP

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Drone Strike: Indian Worker Among 4 Killed in Russia
item.description: An Indian national was among four people killed in Ukraine largest drone strike on Russia, with casualties reported in Moscow and Belgorod regions.
item.dc:creator: MSN

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel-Lebanon: Four Soldiers Injured in Bomb Blast
item.description: Four Israeli soldiers were injured, one seriously, in a roadside bomb explosion in southern Lebanon amid ongoing border tensions.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency
